input: I'm starting as a new full-time employee next month in the US. Walk me through onboarding, benefits enrollment, and leave.
expected_behavior: Agent should synthesize HR-POL-003 (onboarding timeline), HR-POL-007 (benefits enrollment within 30 days), and HR-POL-006 (PTO accrual). Each section should cite its source.
expected_facts: Onboarding 90-day probation from HR-POL-003|Benefits enrollment within 30 days of eligibility from HR-POL-007|Full-time eligible first day of month after hire|PTO starts at 15 days for 0-2 years from HR-POL-006|Mandatory training within first two weeks|30/60/90 day milestones
not_expected: Mixing up which facts come from which document

input: How does my employment classification affect my compensation and benefits?
expected_behavior: Agent should connect HR-POL-001 (classifications), HR-POL-005 (salary bands/bonuses), and HR-POL-007 (benefits eligibility). Should show the relationships.
expected_facts: Full-time 40+ hours eligible for full benefits|Part-time 20+ hours eligible for pro-rated benefits|Part-time under 20 hours generally not eligible|Salary bands L1-L6 from HR-POL-005|Benefits enrollment from HR-POL-007|Citations from at least three documents
not_expected: Information not traced to a specific document

input: Give me a complete picture of the company — leadership, financial performance, and board decisions.
expected_behavior: Agent should synthesize Executive Leadership Team, Quarterly Earnings, and Board Meeting Minutes.
expected_facts: CEO Dr. Amara Okonkwo|CFO James Whitfield|CTO Priya Sharma|FY2025 revenue $63.7B|Q1 revenue $48.3M in board minutes|Analytix Labs acquisition $12.2M|FY2025 guidance raised|Each section cites its source

input: I'm a UK employee concerned about my leave rights and the code of conduct. Can you cover both?
expected_behavior: Agent should provide UK-specific leave from UK Leave Policies AND code of conduct from HR-POL-002. Both documents should be cited.
expected_facts: UK annual leave 28 days including bank holidays|Code of conduct core values from HR-POL-002|Ethics hotline 1-800-555-0192|UK sick pay tiered structure|UK Leave Policies cited|HR-POL-002 cited
not_expected: Mixing US leave policy with UK leave

input: How do I get IT help and where do I go for office facilities issues?
expected_behavior: Agent should address both IT support procedures (portal/Teams/email/phone) and facilities request process (portal/Teams/email/phone for emergencies).
expected_facts: IT tickets via portal or Teams bot or email or phone|IT ticket format INC-2025-XXXXXX|Facilities requests via portal or Teams bot or email|Facilities ticket format FAC-2025-XXXXXX|IT priority P1-P4 SLA times|Facilities priority P1-P4 SLA times

input: What is the total compensation picture for an L4 employee — salary, bonus, benefits, and retirement?
expected_behavior: Agent should combine HR-POL-005 (L4 salary $90k-$130k, bonus 10%-20%) and HR-POL-007 (health plans, 401k match 4%, life insurance 2x salary).
expected_facts: L4 salary band $90k-$130k|Bonus target 10%-20% of base|401(k) match up to 4%|Life insurance 2x annual base salary up to $500000|Three medical plan options|HR-POL-005|HR-POL-007
not_expected: Mixing salary bands from different levels
